TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_umaumahan_anu_makalat_nu_cilkay,_hahican_payu‚Äô_kya_mapulu‚Äô_ku_calenget(1), title = umaumahan_anu_makalat_nu_cilkay,_hahican_payu‚Äô_kya_mapulu‚Äô_ku_calenget(1), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/umaumahan_anu_makalat_nu_cilkay,_hahican_payu‚Äô_kya_mapulu‚Äô_ku_calenget(1)} }

S.FORM: umaumahan anu makalat nu cilkay, hahican payu' kya mapulu' ku calenget anu sadingsingan, katuud ku paylumaluma muladay tu wawa tayda i umaumahan midang, katuud ku wama atu ina malihalaw tu wawa kapahay ku banges kalaten nu tadiwaa', yumahida u udip aku hina makalat nu tadiwaa', , yutawya micukaymas kaku tu sapayu' nu lutuk, Ťá™ŚĺěśąĎśé•Ťßłť¶ôŤó•ŤćČ, i nikaudip hina nipicukaymas tu simal nu lutuk atu sapayu' nu lutuk, u udip aku sinikasumadan, śÉÖś≥ĀśĒĻŤģäšļÜ, hina idau ku katuuday makalat, nika caay pikalat itakuwan, , yuteban nu labi' kalaten nu tadiwaa' inayi' ku hicahica, , tucila sananal makadih malebawa sumanah kya matineng makalat. . yutawya i umaumahan makalat nu tadiwaa' atu kaketi', , uŤĽäŚČćŤćČu sakapahay cukaymasen a sapayu', (Plaintain), u papah hanu ba'tuwen mimelmel patengen i calengetay. , kalamkam tu caay kacalenget atu caay kasumanah, caay kalebawa; uŤĽäŚČćŤćČuśčČšłĀśĖáa imi u nikaydaan nu kuku' nu tademaw, , u pa'nu' nida mikilul tu nakuku'an nu tamdaw katukuh i kitakit, i aidangan, i dadan makadih tu , katuuday a tademaw adih sa u lutuk sa. ŚĺąŚ§öšļļŤ¶ĖšĻčÁāļťáéŤćČ. uŤĽäŚČćŤćČidau ku nipakaahemaw a sapayu', idau ku nipipadang tu bituka atu sawada' anipiilang, šĻüśúČŚä©ŤÉÉŤÖłś∂ąŚĆĖ, nika i tipay, cinida idau ku"Á™ģšļļŤŹ†ŤŹú"a ngangan nu lami', , u pa'nu' nida siyadahay ku BÁĺ§, ŚģÉÁöĄÁ®ģÁĪĹŚźęśúČŚĺąŚ§öBÁĺ§, nika u pa'nu' nida idau ku nipiilang tu sawada', kapah tu ku nipitai'. .
S.PHON: umaumańßan anu makar~…ĺat nu ¶ir~…ĺkaj, ńßańßi ¶an paju Ē~ ° kja mapur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt anu sadiŇčsiŇčan, katuud ku pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma mur~…ĺadaj tu wawa tajda i umaumańßan midaŇč, katuud ku wama atu ina mar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw tu wawa kapańßaj ku baŇč…ôs kar~…ĺat…ôn nu tadiwaa Ē~ °, jumańßida u udip aku ńßina makar~…ĺat nu tadiwaa Ē~ °, , jutawja mi ¶ukajmas kaku tu sapaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk, ********, i nikaudip ńßina nipi ¶ukajmas tu simar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺutuk atu sapaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk, u udip aku sinikasumadan, *****, ńßina idau ku katuudaj makar~…ĺat, nika ¶aaj pikar~…ĺat itakuwan, , jut…ôban nu r~…ĺabi Ē~ ° kar~…ĺat…ôn nu tadiwaa Ē~ ° inaji Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, , tu ¶ir~…ĺa sananar~…ĺ makadińß mar~…ĺ…ôbawa sumanańß kja matin…ôŇč makar~…ĺat. . jutawja i umaumańßan makar~…ĺat nu tadiwaa Ē~ ° atu kak…ôti Ē~ °, , u***u sakapańßaj ¶ukajmas…ôn a sapaju Ē~ °, (pr~…ĺaintain), u papańß ńßanu ba Ē~ °tuw…ôn mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ pat…ôŇč…ôn i ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôtaj. , kar~…ĺamkam tu ¶aaj ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt atu ¶aaj kasumanańß, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôbawa; u***u***a imi u nikajdaan nu kuku Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw, , u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nakuku Ē~ °an nu tamdaw katukuńß i kitakit, i aidaŇčan, i dadan makadińß tu , katuudaj a tad…ômaw adińß sa u r~…ĺutuk sa. ********. u***idau ku nipakaańß…ômaw a sapaju Ē~ °, idau ku nipipadaŇč tu bituka atu sawada Ē~ ° anipiir~…ĺaŇč, *******, nika i tipaj, ¶inida idau ku"****"a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °, , u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida sijadańßaj ku b*, ********b*, nika u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida idau ku nipiir~…ĺaŇč tu sawada Ē~ °, kapańß tu ku nipitai Ē~ °. .
S.FORM: umaumahan anu makalat nu cilkay, hahican payu' kya mapulu' ku calenget anu sadingsingan, katuud ku paylumaluma muladay tu wawa tayda i umaumahan midang, katuud ku wama atu ina malihalaw tu wawa kapahay ku banges kalaten nu tadiwaa', yumahida u udip aku hina makalat nu tadiwaa', , yutawya micukaymas kaku tu sapayu' nu lutuk, Ťá™ŚĺěśąĎśé•Ťßłť¶ôŤó•ŤćČ, i nikaudip hina nipicukaymas tu simal nu lutuk atu sapayu' nu lutuk, u udip aku sinikasumadan, śÉÖś≥ĀśĒĻŤģäšļÜ, hina idau ku katuuday makalat, nika caay pikalat itakuwan, , yuteban nu labi' kalaten nu tadiwaa' inayi' ku hicahica, , tucila sananal makadih malebawa sumanah kya matineng makalat. . yutawya i umaumahan makalat nu tadiwaa' atu kaketi', , uŤĽäŚČćŤćČu sakapahay cukaymasen a sapayu', (Plaintain), u papah hanu ba'tuwen mimelmel patengen i calengetay. , kalamkam tu caay kacalenget atu caay kasumanah, caay kalebawa; uŤĽäŚČćŤćČuśčČšłĀśĖáa imi u nikaydaan nu kuku' nu tademaw, , u pa'nu' nida mikilul tu nakuku'an nu tamdaw katukuh i kitakit, i aidangan, i dadan makadih tu , katuuday a tademaw adih sa u lutuk sa. ŚĺąŚ§öšļļŤ¶ĖšĻčÁāļťáéŤćČ. uŤĽäŚČćŤćČidau ku nipakaahemaw a sapayu', idau ku nipipadang tu bituka atu sawada' anipiilang, šĻüśúČŚä©ŤÉÉŤÖłś∂ąŚĆĖ, nika i tipay, cinida idau ku"Á™ģšļļŤŹ†ŤŹú"a ngangan nu lami', , u pa'nu' nida siyadahay ku BÁĺ§, ŚģÉÁöĄÁ®ģÁĪĹŚźęśúČŚĺąŚ§öBÁĺ§, nika u pa'nu' nida idau ku nipiilang tu sawada', kapah tu ku nipitai'. .
S.PHON: umaumańßan anu makar~…ĺat nu ¶ir~…ĺkaj, ńßańßi ¶an paju Ē~ ° kja mapur~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt anu sadiŇčsiŇčan, katuud ku pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma mur~…ĺadaj tu wawa tajda i umaumańßan midaŇč, katuud ku wama atu ina mar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw tu wawa kapańßaj ku baŇč…ôs kar~…ĺat…ôn nu tadiwaa Ē~ °, jumańßida u udip aku ńßina makar~…ĺat nu tadiwaa Ē~ °, , jutawja mi ¶ukajmas kaku tu sapaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk, ********, i nikaudip ńßina nipi ¶ukajmas tu simar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺutuk atu sapaju Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuk, u udip aku sinikasumadan, *****, ńßina idau ku katuudaj makar~…ĺat, nika ¶aaj pikar~…ĺat itakuwan, , jut…ôban nu r~…ĺabi Ē~ ° kar~…ĺat…ôn nu tadiwaa Ē~ ° inaji Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a, , tu ¶ir~…ĺa sananar~…ĺ makadińß mar~…ĺ…ôbawa sumanańß kja matin…ôŇč makar~…ĺat. . jutawja i umaumańßan makar~…ĺat nu tadiwaa Ē~ ° atu kak…ôti Ē~ °, , u***u sakapańßaj ¶ukajmas…ôn a sapaju Ē~ °, (pr~…ĺaintain), u papańß ńßanu ba Ē~ °tuw…ôn mim…ôr~…ĺm…ôr~…ĺ pat…ôŇč…ôn i ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôtaj. , kar~…ĺamkam tu ¶aaj ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt atu ¶aaj kasumanańß, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ôbawa; u***u***a imi u nikajdaan nu kuku Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw, , u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nakuku Ē~ °an nu tamdaw katukuńß i kitakit, i aidaŇčan, i dadan makadińß tu , katuudaj a tad…ômaw adińß sa u r~…ĺutuk sa. ********. u***idau ku nipakaańß…ômaw a sapaju Ē~ °, idau ku nipipadaŇč tu bituka atu sawada Ē~ ° anipiir~…ĺaŇč, *******, nika i tipaj, ¶inida idau ku"****"a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °, , u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida sijadańßaj ku b*, ********b*, nika u pa Ē~ °nu Ē~ ° nida idau ku nipiir~…ĺaŇč tu sawada Ē~ °, kapańß tu ku nipitai Ē~ °. .
